title: Culinare One Touch Electronic Tin Opener, White, Plastic/Stainless Steel, Automatic Can Opener, Battery Operated/Hands-Free Use/Magnetic Lid Removal, Batteries Not Included
features: The sleek design of the Culinare One Touch Can Opener gives you the functionality of an electronic tin opener in a compact, easy to store design, for simple and straightforward use
Featuring built-in magnets which lift the lid for safe disposal and sharp stainless steel blades for seamless cutting, this can opener ensures easy lid removal on cans 5.2 cm and larger
To use, simply align the opener and place on top of the lid, press the button for one second and release to start cutting; when cutting stops, press the button again and wait for the motor to stop
The automatic functionality of this opener is great for those with limited hand mobility, the elderly or those with arthritis as the One Touch quickly cuts through tin lids at the touch of a button
Items delivered: 1 x Culinare One Touch Can Opener, with stainless steel blades and a blue button for one-handed, designed for maximum precision; requires 2 x AA batteries (not included), in white
description: From the manufacturer Culinare was established over 30 years ago with the launch of the original iconic 'Magican' a product that has since sold over 18 million units worldwide. Culinare now offers a designed range of essential kitchen gadgets and tools at affordable prices, making the task of food preparation easier, safer and quicker. One Touch Can Opener Designed for comfort and efficiency, the Culinare One Touch can opener requires no effort and is easy on the hands for those who limited hand mobility. The Culinare One Touch can opener gives you the functionality of an electronic can opener in a compact, easy to store design. Automatically opens can with start/stop button Ideal for those with limited hand mobiility Built-in magnet for lid disposal Works on cans from 5.2 cm+ Requires 2 x AA batteries (not included) Simple To Use Easy and fuss free way to open cans of any size - simply place on top of can and press the button to start cutting. Once the lid has been fully cut, simply press the button again and wait 3 second to stop cutting. Side Opening No sharp edges - the stainless steel cutting wheel opens cans from sides to prevent sharp edges.
